summary: Added autonomous ChatGPT-governed Claude execution protocol for SpecBridge.
policy_result: No secrets, production deployment, runtime application code, autonomous merge, autonomous push to main, or MCP implementation.
risk_result: Medium risk because it formalizes autonomy, mitigated by contract boundaries, escalation policy, validation, audit packets, and human final merge ownership.
unresolved_risks: Future implementation must ensure Claude Code actually consumes these commands and rules inside Antigravity.
Future versions may need stronger machine validation of escalation artifacts.
